reason: Microsoft system drivers are part of the Windows platform and should not be changed without a specific reason.
HP drivers may support firmware, hotkeys, BIOS interfaces, audio, thermal control, or device-specific features.
Intel drivers commonly support chipset, graphics, storage, networking, Bluetooth, and platform functionality.
NVIDIA drivers support graphics acceleration and should generally be kept unless troubleshooting a known driver issue.
Realtek drivers commonly support audio or network hardware.
